rejectedObservations.observation: The mobile-worker skill should be updated to allow payload-backed evidence when manual simulator verification is impossible in headless sessions.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as already substantially covered: `.factory/skills/mobile-worker/SKILL.md` already requires explicit deviation reporting and strongest available widget/integration evidence when manual simulator/device verification is blocked in non-interactive sessions.

rejectedObservations.observation: The built-in scrutiny validator worker for this milestone exited unexpectedly before producing synthesis.
rejectedObservations.reason: Manual scrutiny synthesis was completed from the committed diffs, review artifacts, and the latest passing full-suite validator runs so the milestone could proceed without rerunning unchanged checks.
